## Plugin Submission Checklist

### Description

Describe what this plugin does, and why it's useful:

### Safety Declaration

- [ ] All files are within the plugin's own directory
- [ ] No obfuscated, minified, or encoded code
- [ ] No sensitive file access (`.env`, SSH keys, credentials, etc.)
- [ ] Plugin does not fetch and execute remote code

### Network / MCP Disclosure

Does this plugin make network calls or declare MCP servers?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes — details:

### Review

- [ ] I have tested the plugin locally with `/plugins install`
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
